scripts.dev: pnpm check:electron && pnpm build && AGENTHUB_ELECTRON_ENTRY=1 electron dist/main.js
scripts.dist: pnpm --dir ../.. --filter @agenthub/contracts build && pnpm --dir ../.. --filter @agenthub/web build && pnpm --dir ../.. --filter @agenthub/control-plane build && pnpm --dir ../.. --filter @agenthub/desktop-runtime build && pnpm build && node ../../scripts/prepare-desktop-bundle.mjs && electron-builder
scripts.pack: pnpm --dir ../.. --filter @agenthub/contracts build && pnpm --dir ../.. --filter @agenthub/web build && pnpm --dir ../.. --filter @agenthub/control-plane build && pnpm --dir ../.. --filter @agenthub/desktop-runtime build && pnpm build && node ../../scripts/prepare-desktop-bundle.mjs && electron-builder --dir
